title: Apply comparability flags + non-comparability audit
context: Each harmonized record must carry comparability flags so users can see why two outcomes may not be directly comparable. This task applies the flags across all records and audits non-comparability. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Apply comparability flags to 100% of records per the mapping rules and run a non-comparability audit documenting why flagged records differ.
acceptanceCriteria: Comparability flags applied to 100% of records per the versioned mapping rules.
Non-comparability audit documents the basis for each flagged difference.
All flagged records remain schema-valid and pass CI gates.
output: /output/datasets/outcomes-flagged/ records with comparability flags plus a non-comparability audit, committed to the repo.
